features: Complete Presentation Set: Our baby shower gift bag set comes ready to make gifting easy and gorgeous.You get: Premium Gift Bags (8.6"x11.8"x4.7")6 coordinating gift wrap sheets (19.7"x19.7")2 themed greeting Cards + Envelopes (4.3"x3.3"),Effortlessly elevate your baby gift presentation.

Premium Quality:These aren't just bags; they're premium keepsakes. Our reinforced, durable bags are waterproof, safe & non-toxic. Designed to endure as both practical carriers and cherished keepsakes.

Unique & Adorable Designs: Express Joy Effortlessly!Share the joy of new beginnings! Our bags feature delicate colors, charming patterns, and cute animal icons with celebratory messages.Each with sturdy handles, they perfectly match the special occasion of welcoming a baby. Meticulously packaged, they're ideal for gifting to moms-to-be, friends, and family, making every present extra memorable.

Thoughtful Design:Express pure joy. Delicate hues, charming patterns & celebratory motifs (featuring adorable animals) in designs. Sturdy handles ensure both beauty and function for memorable gifting.They perfectly match the special occasion of welcoming a baby. Meticulously packaged, they're ideal for gifting to moms-to-be, friends, and family, making every present extra memorable.

Versatile & Spacious: Designed for essentials. Amply holds diapers, clothing, toiletries, toys & more. The ideal, elegant solution for baby showers, welcomes, gender reveals & first birthdays. Effortless Gifting Experience:Curated convenience. Present beautifully without the hunt. This coordinated ensemble delivers instant sophistication, allowing you to focus solely on the celebration.
